meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve stuck with basic apps (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: Freelancer Guide: Master Antigravity Templates for Rapid Apps
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with basic app builds. Learn to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to deliver premium SaaS projects at lightning speed.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template solves the 'stuck with basic apps' syndrome by providing a production-ready, modular architecture out of the box. By integrating it with Claude Code, you automate boilerplate, enforce enterprise-grade security, and accelerate your development cycle from weeks to hours, ensuring you deliver high-end results for every client.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank terminal, the weight of a client’s expectations pressing down. You know how to build, but you're trapped in a cycle of repetitive boilerplate, basic CRUD apps, and mounting technical debt. Every project feels like a struggle against the framework, rather than a creative sprint toward a high-value deliverable.

It’s time to break that cycle. The Antigravity project template is the industry secret for high-velocity freelancers who refuse to compromise on quality. By decoupling your business logic from the infrastructure, you shift from being a code-monkey to a high-value architect, turning complex requirements into shippable assets in record time.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish a production-grade foundation. This step ensures your directory structure follows modern SaaS best practices.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new project using the Antigravity template with authentication, database ORM, and API middleware pre-configured.

steps.title: Define Schema via Natural Language
steps.description: Use Antigravity's schema engine to define your data models without writing manual migrations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a database schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application including Users, Subscriptions, and Project entities.

steps.title: Generate Secure API Endpoints
steps.description: Automate the creation of RESTful endpoints with built-in validation and error handling.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate secure CRUD endpoints for the Project entity with role-based access control enabled.

steps.title: Inject Business Logic
steps.description: Focus on the unique value proposition of your client's project while the template handles the plumbing.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement a custom service layer for the Project entity to handle automated reporting logic.

steps.title: Deploy to Production Environment
steps.description: Verify your build integrity and push to your staging environment using the CLI.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run the pre-deployment audit to check for security vulnerabilities and optimize build assets.

pro_tips: Always use the '--dry-run' flag in Claude Code before applying large architectural changes to your template.
Map your client's unique business rules into a custom 'config.json' file within the Antigravity folder to make future updates instantaneous.
Leverage the Antigravity middleware hooks for logging; it saves hours of debugging during client UAT phases.
Rename your generated services to match domain-driven design patterns to impress clients with clean, professional codebases.
Cache your dependencies locally after the first build to reduce CI/CD times by up to 60%.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is live, iterate by creating your own custom sub-templates for your specific niche (e.g., e-commerce vs. SaaS dashboarding).
content.conversion_block: Stop building from scratch and start scaling your freelance business with the tools that elite developers use. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
